functions.name: UpdateMaterialInstance
functions.description: Called after making modifications to a Material Instance to recompile shaders etc.

functions.name: UpdateMaterialFunction
functions.description: Update a Material Function after edits have been made.

functions.name: SetMaterialUsage
functions.description: Enable a particular usage for the supplied material (e.g. SkeletalMesh, ParticleSprite etc)

functions.name: SetMaterialInstanceVectorParameterValue
functions.description: Set the vector parameter value for a Material Instance

functions.name: SetMaterialInstanceTextureParameterValue
functions.description: Set the texture parameter value for a Material Instance

functions.name: SetMaterialInstanceStaticSwitchParameterValue
functions.description: Set the static switch parameter value for a Material Instance

functions.name: SetMaterialInstanceSparseVolumeTextureParameterValue
functions.description: Set the texture parameter value for a Material Instance

functions.name: SetMaterialInstanceScalarParameterValue
functions.description: Set the scalar (float) parameter value for a Material Instance

functions.name: SetMaterialInstanceRuntimeVirtualTextureParameterValue
functions.description: Set the texture parameter value for a Material Instance

functions.name: SetMaterialInstanceParent
functions.description: Set the parent Material or Material Instance to use for this Material Instance

functions.name: RenameMaterialParameterGroup
functions.description: Renames a material parameter group within the specified material.

functions.name: RenameMaterialFunctionParameterGroup
functions.description: Renames a material parameter group within the specified material function.

functions.name: RecompileMaterial
functions.description: Trigger a recompile of a material. Must be performed after making changes to the graph to have changes reflected.

functions.name: LayoutMaterialFunctionExpressions
functions.description: Layouts the expressions in a grid pattern

functions.name: LayoutMaterialExpressions
functions.description: Layouts the expressions in a grid pattern

functions.name: HasMaterialUsage
functions.description: Check if a particular usage is enabled for the supplied material (e.g. SkeletalMesh, ParticleSprite etc)

functions.name: GetVectorParameterSource
functions.description: Returns the path of the asset where the parameter originated, as well as true/false if it was found

functions.name: GetVectorParameterNames
functions.description: Gets all vector parameter names

functions.name: GetUsedTextures
functions.description: Get the list of textures used by a material

functions.name: GetTextureParameterSource
functions.description: Returns the path of the asset where the parameter originated, as well as true/false if it was found

functions.name: GetTextureParameterNames
functions.description: Gets all texture parameter names

functions.name: GetStatistics
functions.description: Returns statistics about the given material

functions.name: GetStaticSwitchParameterSource
functions.description: Returns the path of the asset where the parameter originated, as well as true/false if it was found

functions.name: GetStaticSwitchParameterNames
functions.description: Gets all static switch parameter names

functions.name: GetScalarParameterSource
functions.description: Returns the path of the asset where the parameter originated, as well as true/false if it was found

functions.name: GetScalarParameterNames
functions.description: Gets all scalar parameter names

functions.name: GetNumMaterialExpressionsInFunction
functions.description: Returns number of material expressions in the supplied material

functions.name: GetNumMaterialExpressions
functions.description: Returns number of material expressions in the supplied material

functions.name: GetNaniteOverrideMaterial
functions.description: Returns any nanite override material for the given material

functions.name: GetMaterialSelectedNodes
functions.description: Get the set of selected nodes from an active material editor

functions.name: GetMaterialPropertyInputNodeOutputName
functions.description: Get the node output name providing the output for a given material property from an active material editor

functions.name: GetMaterialPropertyInputNode
functions.description: Get the node providing the output for a given material property from an active material editor

functions.name: GetMaterialInstanceVectorParameterValue
functions.description: Get the current vector parameter value from a Material Instance

functions.name: GetMaterialInstanceTextureParameterValue
functions.description: Get the current texture parameter value from a Material Instance

functions.name: GetMaterialInstanceStaticSwitchParameterValue
functions.description: Get the current static switch parameter value from a Material Instance

functions.name: GetMaterialInstanceSparseVolumeTextureParameterValue
functions.description: Get the current texture parameter value from a Material Instance

functions.name: GetMaterialInstanceScalarParameterValue
functions.description: Get the current scalar (float) parameter value from a Material Instance

functions.name: GetMaterialInstanceRuntimeVirtualTextureParameterValue
functions.description: Get the current texture parameter value from a Material Instance

functions.name: GetMaterialExpressionNodePosition
functions.description: Get the position of the MaterialExpression node.

functions.name: GetMaterialExpressionInputTypes
functions.description: Get the array of input pin types for a material expression

functions.name: GetMaterialExpressionInputNames
functions.description: Get the array of input pin names for a material expression

functions.name: GetMaterialDefaultVectorParameterValue
functions.description: Get the default vector parameter value from a Material

functions.name: GetMaterialDefaultTextureParameterValue
functions.description: Get the default texture parameter value from a Material

functions.name: GetMaterialDefaultStaticSwitchParameterValue
functions.description: Get the default static switch parameter value from a Material

functions.name: GetMaterialDefaultScalarParameterValue
functions.description: Get the default scalar (float) parameter value from a Material

functions.name: GetInputsForMaterialExpression
functions.description: Get the set of nodes acting as inputs to a node from an active material editor

functions.name: GetInputNodeOutputNameForMaterialExpression
functions.description: Get the output name of input node connected to MaterialExpression from an active material editor

functions.name: GetChildInstances
functions.description: Gets all direct child mat instances

functions.name: DuplicateMaterialExpression
functions.description: Duplicates the provided material expression adding it to the same material / material function, and copying parameters.

functions.name: DeleteMaterialExpressionInFunction
functions.description: Delete a specific expression from a material function. Will disconnect from other expressions.

functions.name: DeleteMaterialExpression
functions.description: Delete a specific expression from a material. Will disconnect from other expressions.

functions.name: DeleteAllMaterialExpressionsInFunction
functions.description: Delete all material expressions in the supplied material function

functions.name: DeleteAllMaterialExpressions
functions.description: Delete all material expressions in the supplied material

functions.name: CreateMaterialExpressionInFunction
functions.description: Create a new material expression node within the supplied material function

functions.name: CreateMaterialExpression
functions.description: Create a new material expression node within the supplied material

functions.name: ConnectMaterialProperty
functions.description: Connect a material expression output to one of the material property inputs (e.g. diffuse color, opacity etc)

functions.name: ConnectMaterialExpressions
functions.description: Create connection between two material expressions

functions.name: ClearAllMaterialInstanceParameters
functions.description: Clears all material parameters set by this Material Instance
